Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgmnt
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgement" is granted.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
